topStories.title: ‘Take the oil because it’s there for the taking’, says Trump as he suggests use of military power to obtain Iran's oil
topStories.description: US President Donald Trump on Monday (local time) said that if it were up to him, he would have preferred using military power to take control of Iran's vast oil reserves, AP reported

topStories.title: Congress petitions Election Commission to cancel Assam CM’s candidature over ‘undisclosed assets’
topStories.description: Bidisha Neog, Chief Minister Himanta Biswa Sarma’s rival from the Jalukbari constituency, claims he did not mention his wife’s alleged offshore assets in the poll affidavit

topStories.title: After ICE detention, 5‑year‑old Liam Conejo Ramos suffers trauma and sees a psychologist, parents say
topStories.description: Liam Conejo Ramos, the five-year-old boy who was detained by the US Immigration and Customs Enforcement (ICE) in January this year, reportedly fears being detained again. Sharing how their son has changed, his parents, in an interview, said that he is now seeing a psychologist regularly.

topStories.title: "Uranium Heist": Iran's Big Claim On Daring US Op To Rescue Downed Airman
topStories.description: Tehran reportedly holds between 400 and 450 kilograms of enriched uranium, an amount that could contribute to the production of nuclear weapons.

topStories.title: Hulk Hogan: Real American - Netflix Trailer Shows WWE Icon's Unfiltered Life
topStories.description: the documentary is a four-episode limited series on Netflix. It will take the audience into the unfiltered life of the wrestler and his journey throughout.

topStories.title: Live updates: Trump to address media as deadline looms for Iran on Strait of Hormuz
topStories.description: With a military standoff intensifying and a critical deadline approaching, Trump’s address is likely to set the tone for the next phase of US action against Iran while also navigating political challenges at home. We’ll keep you updated with the latest developments as the event unfolds.

topStories.title: US Marshals Service granted exceptions for Musk’s DOGE security, waived training rules: Report
topStories.description: Recently disclosed government emails have now revealed that the US Marshals Service waived off requirements for Billionaire Elon Musk's security detail during his time at the Department of Government Efficiency (DOGE)

topStories.title: Quote of the day: Michael Korda's take on discipline and goals – ‘One way to keep momentum going is to have…’
topStories.description: Michael Korda reminds us that momentum is fragile and must be sustained through ever-evolving goals. Achievement isn’t the end but a stepping stone; without new challenges, motivation fades. Continuous ambition keeps progress alive and prevents stagnation.

dailyNews.title: Steve Bannon case: Supreme Court clears legal path for dismissal of charges linked to Capitol riot investigation
dailyNews.description: Both federal prosecutors and Bannon requested that the Supreme Court vacate a lower appeals court ruling that had upheld his conviction. They also asked that the case be sent back to a trial court with instructions to dismiss the original charges.

dailyNews.title: ‘Not getting answers’: SC on ‘unreliable’ forensic report in Biren Singh row
dailyNews.description: “As per this report, even the Doordarshan recording is tampered with. Should we then ask him to come and record his voice?” the Supreme Court asked

dailyNews.title: Assembly elections LIVE: Congress keeps singing to Pakistan's tunes, compromising nation’s security, says PM Modi
dailyNews.description: On the development front, Prime Minister Narendra Modi alleged that the Congress had always taken a myopic view on the matter, while the BJP works towards ensuring long-term development of the nation

dailyNews.title: Who is Steve Hilton? Trump-endorsed Republican aiming to replace Gavin Newsom in 2026 governor election
dailyNews.description: Steve Hilton’s career spans British politics, Silicon Valley innovation, and American media. With a blend of policy experience, media visibility, and now a high-profile endorsement from Donald Trump, he has emerged as a key Republican figure in California’s 2026 gubernatorial race.

dailyNews.title: Ahead of Donald Trump’s Iran war briefing, Tehran rejects US 15-point plan as ‘illogical,’ hardens stance
dailyNews.description: While delivering Iranian stance on the 15-point plan, Iran foreign ministry spokesperson Esmail Baghaei also said that any negotiations cannot take place under threats.

dailyNews.title: Saudi Arabia hikes Arab Light crude to record premium for Asian refiners as US-Iran war continues
dailyNews.description: Saudi Arabia has raised the price of its Arab Light crude for Asian buyers to a record premium of $19.50, amid heightened tensions in the Middle East. This increase, though significant, was reportedly lower than analysts anticipated due to volatility in oil benchmarks.

dailyNews.title: On Iran, Trump Keeps World Off Balance With Ever-Changing Threats
dailyNews.description: Global leaders are struggling in their efforts to find a way to end the American-Israeli war on Iran, and they are spooked about what President Trump might do next.

dailyNews.title: A Harrowing Race Against Time to Find a Downed U.S. Airman in Iran
dailyNews.description: For the Iranians, the Air Force colonel whose fighter jet had been shot down was possible leverage. For the U.S. military, finding him was a moral imperative.

dailyNews.title: The Latest Blows to Iran’s Leadership
dailyNews.description: An Iranian intelligence chief killed overnight on Monday was one of several Iranian officials who occupied their posts for only a few months.

dailyNews.title: Newly Obtained Video of Minneapolis Shooting Undermines ICE Account
dailyNews.description: Prosecutors did not watch video of the nonfatal shooting until weeks after charging the wounded man, an official said.

dailyNews.title: Plunging International Student Enrollment Under Trump Squeezes Colleges
dailyNews.description: The Trump administration’s campaign to curtail international students is not just hitting the elite schools targeted by the government.

dailyNews.title: Trump’s USAID Overhaul Sent Millions More Dollars to Big U.S.-Based Contractors
dailyNews.description: While organizations in the developing world were nearly shut out, the big aid agencies DOGE had called wasteful received huge infusions of cash, a new analysis found.

dailyNews.title: Watch Live: Trump holds news conference on Iran after U.S. airman's rescue
dailyNews.description: President Trump is holding a news conference at the White House following the successful rescue of a U.S. airman inside Iran.

dailyNews.title: Trump calls Iran's latest proposal to end war "substantial"
dailyNews.description: President Trump told reporters at the White House on Monday that a counterproposal from Iran to end the war was "substantial." CBS News' Nancy Cordes has more.

dailyNews.title: Trump says he would keep Iran's oil but Americans wouldn't understand
dailyNews.description: President Trump commented on potential proposals to end the war in Iran and said if it were up to him, he would keep Iran's oil. Mr. Trump made the comments during the White House's annual Easter Egg Roll.

dailyNews.title: Top cops out: The attorney general firings and forced exits that made history
dailyNews.description: Pam Bondi's exit is the latest in a long history of attorney general firings and resignations that shook Washington, from Nixon to Trump and beyond.

dailyNews.title: Top GOP defense voice breaks with invasion fears, says US can reopen Hormuz without ground war
dailyNews.description: Rep. Mike Turner says he doesn't think U.S. ground troops will be necessary to open the Strait of Hormuz amid Trump's escalating threats to Iran.

dailyNews.title: Trump reveals Iran made 'significant proposal' after ultimatum, but 'not good enough'
dailyNews.description: Trump tells reporters at the White House Easter Egg Roll that Iran made a significant proposal but says it is not good enough amid ongoing strikes.

dailyNews.title: WNBA champ Natasha Cloud takes issue with Trump's Iran message on Easter
dailyNews.description: New York Liberty guard Natasha Cloud slammed President Donald Trump for his Easter Sunday warning to Iran, saying a president threatening to bomb "is not a man of Christ."

dailyNews.title: Trump says he would like Iran's oil but 'American people would like to see us come home'
dailyNews.description: President Trump told reporters he would like to "take the oil" from Iran but "unfortunately the American people would like to see us come home."

dailyNews.title: Trump tells kids about autopens at Easter Egg Roll
dailyNews.description: While spending time with children at the annual White House Easter Egg Roll, President Trump discussed former President Biden and autopens.

dailyNews.description: Trumps participate in White House Easter Egg Roll
